prompt: Genera la Guia Docente para la Unidad 1 de Lengua y Literatura 5to EGB 'Explorando la narrativa' con 2 temas y 4 destrezas (DZ-LENG-5-001 a DZ-LENG-5-004).
expected_output: Complete teacher guide with weekly planning, methodological orientations for all phases, DUA adaptations for every activity, rubrics for all indicators, and coverage summary.
expectations: Weekly planning table maps activities to sessions with time estimates
Methodological orientations cover all 4 phases (Experiencia, Conceptualizacion, Reflexion, Aplicacion)
At least 2 DUA adaptations per activity covering at least 2 of 3 DUA principles
Rubrics have 3+ performance levels (basico, intermedio, avanzado)
Rubric descriptors use observable action verbs, not subjective language

prompt: Genera adaptaciones DUA para una actividad de escritura creativa en 6to EGB donde el estudiante debe escribir un cuento corto.
expected_output: DUA adaptations covering all 3 principles with specific, actionable strategies. Should include modality alternatives that don't penalize students who struggle with writing.
expectations: Representacion adaptation present (e.g., visual story map template)
Compromiso adaptation present (e.g., choice of topic, pair work option)
Accion/Expresion adaptation present (e.g., oral storytelling or comic format as alternative)
Adaptations specify which student profiles benefit

prompt: Genera la Guia Docente para Matematica 7mo EGB sin proporcionar la unidad editorial.
expected_output: Error response indicating the generated unit is required before creating the guide. Should suggest running generate-unit first.
expectations: Response indicates the editorial unit is required input
Does not generate guide content without the companion unit
Explains that a guide without its unit is an orphaned document
